title: WendyOS fleet manifest (wendy-fleet.json)
description: A fleet placement/topology manifest kept separate from a project's single-app wendy.json: which components exist and where each is placed. The Go parser (appconfig.FleetManifest) is the source of truth; the per-component entitlements/readiness/hooks/frameworks/resources shapes mirror wendy.schema.json and are validated there.

appId.description: Reverse-DNS fleet identifier; each component deploys as "<appId>.<componentName>".

components.description: Placed components, each fanned out to a device group (edge tier) or run once centrally (central tier).

component.description: A single placed component of a fleet app.

context.description: Build context directory relative to wendy-fleet.json.

discovers.description: Other components whose live endpoints are injected into this component.

componentTarget.description: Where a component runs. Set exactly one of "group" or "central".

group.description: Fan the component out to every device in this named device group (edge tier).

central.description: Run the component once (central tier) — on an edge device, a separate host, or the cloud.

componentExpose.description: The network endpoint this component serves, advertised for cross-device discovery.

path.description: Optional URL path the component serves (e.g. "/stream"). The advertised discovery URL is the origin (scheme://host:port); consumers append their own paths.

discoverRef.description: Inject another (group/edge) component's live endpoints into this component.

component.description: Name of the group component to discover.

as.description: Environment variable to receive the JSON peer snapshot. WENDY_DISCOVERY_URL (live API) is auto-injected and reserved.
